title: Ancient Structures: Chinese [Datapack]
description: A datapack for Ancient Structure mod
body:
**🏛️ Ancient Structures** Ancient Structures is a full-featured Minecraft mod that adds cultural, handcrafted structures from ancient civilizations directly into your world. It serves as a bridge within the Dawn of Time ecosystem, showcasing the architectural potential of Dawn of Time blocks and the animated armor models from Armor of the Ages through immersive world generation. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) **About Ancient Structures: Chinese** This datapack is a addons for Ancient Structure and add various structure inspired from China History into Minecraft. These structures adds customs mobs and various loots for the players to create a great experience. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) **The datapack requires the following dependencies to work :** * [Dawn of Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/dawn-of-time) * [Armor of the Ages](https://modrinth.com/mod/armor-of-the-ages) * [Fusion](https://modrinth.com/mod/fusion-connected-textures) * [YetAnotherConfig (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) * [Garden Trails](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/garden-trails) ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Our mods
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Next Update ? News update will come for the datapack to add news structures with new loots and customs mobs to find. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credits * **Jackie** – contributed to several buildings and created the custom mobs * **TheGoldenWorld** – creator of the original datapack and all core structures * [Retro Diffusion](https://www.retrodiffusion.ai/) has been used to generate the logo of this page ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Socials
